narrative:
Union Township P1P (precinct in Clermont County) has 938 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
